turns.content: Add authentication middleware and rate limiting to the API, and refactor error handling.

intent_groups.title: Add user authentication middleware
intent_groups.task_grounding: Implements JWT-based authentication middleware that validates tokens on protected routes.

annotations.body: Used RS256 algorithm for JWT verification to support key rotation.

intent_groups.title: Add rate limiting to API endpoints
intent_groups.task_grounding: Adds sliding window rate limiting using Redis to prevent API abuse.

annotations.body: Redis connection pooling strategy needs review — currently using default pool size.

causal_links.rationale: Rate limiting depends on auth middleware to identify authenticated vs anonymous requests.

intent_groups.title: Refactor error handling
intent_groups.task_grounding: Centralizes error handling into a single middleware with structured error responses.

open_questions.question: Should rate limiting apply to authenticated admin endpoints?
open_questions.context: Currently rate limiting is applied uniformly. Admin endpoints might need different limits.
open_questions.default_behavior: Apply the same rate limits to all endpoints including admin.

negative_space.explanation: Auth middleware reads from existing user table — no schema changes needed.
Session-based auth is planned for phase 2; this PR only implements stateless JWT.
